name: tsextract
description: gnr8 TypeScript source sidecar: turns a NestJS service into the neutral JSON facts contract via the TypeScript Compiler API. It borrows the USER's own `typescript` (resolved from the target project, like goextract uses `go` and pyextract uses `python3`) — gnr8 ships no typescript. `typescript` below is a devDependency for gnr8's OWN test suite only (gitignored node_modules, restored via `npm ci`). Never executes the target; never reads swagger/zod/class-validator (rule 1). `prettier` is likewise a test-suite-only devDependency: the `sdk_lint` test uses it to assert the generated TS SDK is already Prettier-clean — never shipped, never run in the release/generation path.
